name: Plaid
description: Plaid provides APIs and SDKs to connect apps to users' bank accounts, retrieve account and transaction data, and enable payments and identity services.

auth_methods.note: Plaid issues a client_id and secret (used in request body) and supports HTTP Basic auth. Plaid also issues per-Item access_tokens for user-specific requests; OAuth is used at the institution connection level (via Link) but not as the API auth scheme. 'api_key' is used here to represent client_id/secret, 'basic' for HTTP Basic, 'token' for access_token, and 'other' to reflect institution-level OAuth flows.

credential_access.note: Developers can create a free Plaid Dashboard account to access Sandbox and Development and obtain client_id and secret; Sandbox is available without sales approval.

api_surface.note: Plaid provides a broad REST API covering accounts, transactions, identity, assets, payments, transfers, webhooks, etc., plus server-side client libraries and client-side Link SDKs as documented on the API reference.

buildability.note: With a self-serve Dashboard signup (Sandbox/Development) and documented REST APIs and SDKs, developers can build integrations today. Production access may require business verification or contacting sales for certain products, but basic development and many integrations are possible immediately.

queries: Plaid developer documentation API docs site:plaid.com/docs
site:plaid.com "pricing" Plaid pricing API access production contact sales
